rubric_content.text_property: The response uses the cached MASS evidence and reports relevant experiment identifiers or configurations when applicable.
The response distinguishes multi-seed evidence from single-seed or short-window preliminary evidence.
The response includes key Rank IC values or otherwise accurately summarizes signal-quality metrics from the cached MASS evidence.
The response states that Rank IC is a signal-quality metric and should not be interpreted as realized portfolio return.
The response includes appropriate research-only or no-financial-advice caveats and avoids buy or sell recommendations.
